Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Continued To May-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 18, 1993 and first codicil dated November 02, 1999 is admitted to probate. Alvin T. Levitt, Wendy Tonkin, and Jill Tonkin Finegold are appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 22, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
